projects.title: Project One
projects.description: Brief description of the project and your role.

caseStudy.overview: A comprehensive overview of the project, explaining the context and scope of work.
objectives: Establish a cohesive brand identity that resonates with target audience
Create scalable design system for future growth
Increase brand recognition and market presence
caseStudy.challenge: Describe the main challenge or problem that needed to be solved. What obstacles existed? What were the constraints?
caseStudy.approach: Detail your strategic approach to solving the problem. What research did you conduct? What frameworks or methodologies did you use?

userExperience.description: Explain the user experience considerations and how you approached designing for the end user.

caseStudy.solution: Describe the final solution and how it addressed the objectives. What was the creative direction? How did the design choices support the goals?
